hooks.command: COMMIT_MSG=$(git log -1 --pretty=%B 2>/dev/null) && CHANGED_FILES=$(git diff-tree --no-commit-id --name-only -r HEAD 2>/dev/null) && if echo "$COMMIT_MSG" | head -1 | grep -qE '^Merge '; then exit 0; fi && MEANINGFUL=$(echo "$CHANGED_FILES" | grep -vE '(node_modules/|package-lock\.json|yarn\.lock|pnpm-lock\.yaml|\.claude/plans/|^scripts/|^\.claude/)' || true) && if [ -z "$MEANINGFUL" ]; then exit 0; fi && if echo "$CHANGED_FILES" | grep -qE '^CHANGELOG\.md$'; then exit 0; fi && HEAD_SHA=$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null) && MARK="$(git rev-parse --git-dir 2>/dev/null)/changelog-hook-reminded" && if [ -f "$MARK" ] && [ "$(cat "$MARK" 2>/dev/null)" = "$HEAD_SHA" ]; then exit 0; fi && echo "$HEAD_SHA" > "$MARK" && FIRST_LINE=$(echo "$COMMIT_MSG" | head -1) && printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"Stop","additionalContext":"A commit was just made without updating CHANGELOG.md. Commit: %s. Files changed: %s. Please suggest a Keep a Changelog entry for the [Unreleased] section and ask the user if they want to add it."}}' "$FIRST_LINE" "$(echo $MEANINGFUL | tr '\n' ', ')"
